usd_reason: The dollar is rising because higher US interest rates are expected
gold_reason: Higher US interest rates make gold less attractive to investors
indices_reason: The stock market is falling because the Fed's decision to hold interest rates steady was seen as less supportive of the economy than expected
lead_story: The Federal Reserve held interest rates steady, but some officials think rates might go up later this year, which is causing uncertainty in the markets. This decision is the biggest driver of market movements right now. The Fed's new chairman, Kevin Warsh, is also making changes that are being closely watched by investors.
